projectDescription: Tessellation is the Constellation Network node software — a DAG-based distributed ledger framework providing Layer 0 global consensus and Layer 1 metagraph validators with an extensible SDK for building custom data applications.
keyFeatures: Hierarchical DAG consensus with Layer 0 global state and Layer 1 metagraph validators
Extensible metagraph SDK for building custom data applications on the network
Anti-entropy gossip protocol for resilient peer-to-peer state synchronization
Multi-phase consensus engine with FSM-based round management and stall detection
Merkle Patricia Trie state proofs for verifiable snapshot integrity
Delegated staking and node collateral mechanisms for network security
Rosetta API compatibility for blockchain data standardization
Kubernetes-native deployment with Kustomize overlays and Skaffold support
publicApiSurface: GET /global-snapshots/latest — Get the latest global snapshot
GET /global-snapshots/{ordinal} — Get global snapshot by ordinal
POST /state-channels/{address}/snapshot — Submit metagraph snapshot to L0
GET /transactions/last-reference/{address} — Get last transaction reference for address
POST /delegated-stakes — Create or update delegated stake
GET /dag/{address}/balance — Get DAG balance for address
CurrencyL0App — Extension point for metagraph L0 customization
CurrencyL1App — Extension point for metagraph L1 customization
